"[7] VEHS WERE ROAD RAGING BEFORE TC / XRY INTENTIONALLY HIT THE RP'S HOND"

"[10] 97-S1 CLOSURE WILL MOVE UP TO PALM CANYON IN 1-2 HRS APPPROX "
"[9] RDWY WILL BE CLOSED FOR APPROX 6-10 HOURS AT THIS TIME "

"[8] CLOSURE IN PLACE FROM BOTTOM OF SR74 IN PALM DESERT TO 74/SR371 -- ANYONE NEEDING TO GET TO ANZA OR MOUNTAIN COMMUNITIES WILL NEED TO GO UP THROUGH SR243 OR FROM THE HEMET SIDE, SR371 IS ACCESSIBLE ONLY FROM THE HEMET SIDE"

"[38] HE WILL HEAD TO 5 HAWK RD FOR ADDL FOLLOW UP "
"[28] B85-005 RO IS LONGER THERE HE IS AT USBP ACADEMY HE SOLD VEH 9 MONTHS AGO TO PRTY LIVES AT 5 HAWK IN BWY "
